name: Apple-Cheese Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the apples into 1/8 to 1/4 inch pieces; set aside.
2. In a blender or food processor, combine 1 cup of cottage cheese, 1/2 cup of half and half, 1/4 cup of apple butter, 1/4 cup of sugar, cinnamon, cloves, and one egg. Blend until smooth. Pour into a large bowl. Repeat with the remaining cottage cheese, half and half, apple butter, and egg.
3. Combine the pureed mixtures.
4. Stir in the chopped apples.
5. Pour into an ice cream canister.
6. Freeze according to the manufacturer's directions for your ice cream maker. Makes 2 quarts.
